abhi-√vṛṣ P. (aor. -avarṣīt) to rain upon,  RV. vii, 103, 3 ;  AV.  &c.:
P. (sometimes Ā.) to bedew, cover with (instr.) a shower (as of arrows or blossoms, &c.),  MBh.  &c.;
(said of gods) to cause to rain,  VarBṛS.  &c.

results.rendered_html:
abhivṛṣ 1 P. To rain upon, pour, sprinkle, water, bedew, cover with (a shower of any thing), pour or shower down upon; prasnavenābhivarṣaṃtī (bhuvaṃ)  R. 1. 84 ; 10. 48 , 15. 58 , 99 ;  Ki. 2. 31 ; bāṇairmāmabhivarṣati  V. 4. 
— Caus. To sprinkle or cover with, shower upon,
